summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated WIBCF website focusing on Asia-focused messaging, Leadership page updates, Media page Coming Soon conversion, official logo implementation, email update, and scroll-to-top functionality.

issues: Minor scroll position offset (77px) when using navigation links vs direct URL navigation

passed_tests: Homepage hero displays 'Empowering Business & Cultural Collaboration Across Asia'
Official WIBCF logo displays in header and footer
Footer shows updated Pan-Asia description and info@wibcf.org email
Leadership page shows Founder section with Mr. Ravichandren Raman details
Leadership page shows 'Advisory Board – Updating Soon'
Leadership page shows 'Country Coordinators – Coming Soon'
Leadership page shows 'Global Ambassadors – Updating Soon'
Media page hero shows 'Media – Coming Soon'
Media page shows News, Press Releases, Media Gallery as 'Coming Soon'
Scroll position resets to top on direct URL navigation (working correctly)
Contact form loads and integrates properly with backend API
Contact form submission successful with success message display
Backend API endpoints all working (100% success rate)
All requested updates implemented and functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (14/15 tests passed - minor scroll offset issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Navigation link clicks result in small scroll offset (77px) instead of perfect 0px scroll position. This is very minor and doesn't affect user experience significantly.
